name: Microwave Oatmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe container, combine 1/3 cup of oatmeal with 2 cups of cold water.
2. Stir the mixture to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Cover the container and microwave on high for 3 minutes.
4. After each minute of cooking, stir the oatmeal thoroughly.
5. Once cooked, uncover the container and turn off the microwave.
6. Allow the porridge to cool slightly before serving.
Note: Using a container large enough will allow the oatmeal to rise during cooking without boiling over or damaging the microwave oven.
